name: ElCoach
description: Developer of a fitness and nutrition application designed to offer personalized body transformation programs based on individual needs. The company's application offers current stats, fitness levels, and personal goals that are used for customized diet and workout programs that offer tools and food tables to follow the instructions and calculate the progress of the training, enabling users to track their fitness and to get diet and exercise from anywhere, at any time.

name: Elmawkaa
description: Operator of an e-commerce marketplace intended to connect construction companies with suppliers. The company offers a mobile-based application for buying building materials in Egypt and provides engineering services and updates on the latest prices of building materials, enabling stakeholders and parties associated with the building and construction sector to find deals conveniently.

name: Esar
description: Developer of a car rental platform designed to provide a peer-to-peer car rental service. The company's platform connect and allow community members to rent unique fully insured cars that suit their needs as per their choice of color, and specifications along with complete comfort, and safety, enabling users to fulfill their transportation needs.

name: In Your Shoe
description: The company offers unique outwear, homeware, socks, sportswear, and accessories that cater to all different tastes and are of high quality, providing users with diverse statement and playful designs of apparel.

name: OTO Global
description: Developer of shipping gateway platform designed to speed up deliveries and bring improvements in the retail sector. The company's platform automates and streamlines all shipping operations by combining an order management system (OMS), warehouse management system (WMS), last-mile management system (LMS), and many others, it empowers companies of all sizes to ship, manage, track, return & analyze all their online & offline orders with shipping carriers from a consolidated dashboard, enabling clients to ship faster, cheaper and better, but saving time and operational costs.

name: Scalable CFO
description: Developer of a financial software designed to connect fast-growing companies to finance leaders. The company platform offers a member-only community of like-minded senior finance experts who are committed to helping small businesses grow, enabling finance professionals to stay in control of their work/lifestyles and companies to seek expert finance consultation that is customized to their needs.

name: Simplifai Labs
description: Developer of a marketing platform designed to target micro-moments that matter by combining image, sentiment and emotional recognition. The company's platform allows brands to reduce their digital marketing wastage, enabling them to increase brand safety and communication relevancy by manifolds.

name: TechieMatter
description: Developer of a recruitment platform intended to find the desired technical talent. The company's platform connects employers with prospective candidates through a network of various tech verifiers, information technology sources, filters and technical assessments, enabling companies to find the right talent that fits their needs.

name: Workhint
description: Developer of B2B SaaS solutions intended to help create a matching platform for different business functions. The company's system creates a platform in three steps that are named supply & demand, select request block, and invite users, the whole can be used in different use-cases and functions like advisory, mentorship, telemedicine, freelance management, and part-timers management, enabling organizations to reduce cost, improve productivity, and drive insight-driven decisions.
